case_title: BAXTER RONNY B. VS BRINK ROBERT R. MD.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAXTER RONNY B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRINK ROBERT R. MD. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
